name: ebenova-legal-docs
description: Generate legal documents, detect scope violations, extract terms from conversations, and link contracts to payments. 34 document types, 18 jurisdictions including Nigeria, UK, US, Canada, Ghana, Kenya, UAE. Built for developers, SaaS platforms, and AI agents.

tools.name: generate_legal_document
tools.description: Generate a professionally drafted legal document. 34 types, 18 jurisdictions.

tools.name: extract_from_conversation
tools.description: Extract structured legal document fields from a WhatsApp, email, or chat conversation.

tools.name: list_document_types
tools.description: List all 34 supported legal document types grouped by category.

tools.name: check_usage
tools.description: Check monthly document generation quota and remaining usage.

tools.name: get_document_templates
tools.description: Get field schemas for document types to build dynamic forms.

tools.name: batch_generate_documents
tools.description: Generate up to 10 legal documents in a single call.

tools.name: analyze_scope_creep
tools.description: Detect when client messages violate contract terms. Returns 3 professional response drafts.

tools.name: generate_change_order
tools.description: Generate a formal change order when scope changes are detected.
